overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza at night, featuring a massive holographic golden koi fish swimming between neon-lit skyscrapers. The camera tilts up to follow the fish overhead before returning to street level, passing pedestrians and futuristic urban architecture.

modern concrete seating along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city plaza at night, walking toward a massive golden holographic koi fish suspended between neon-lit skyscrapers. The Petrochem tower dominates the background while pedestrians stroll along the concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical canyon view between skyscrapers with overhead holographic display

events.description: camera tilts sharply upward to track the holographic fish swimming overhead
blue holographic fish briefly appears swimming on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: tilting head upward to watch the holographic koi fish swimming between the towering buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to follow the golden holographic fish as it swims overhead through the canyon of skyscrapers. A smaller blue holographic fish briefly appears on the left, and the view shifts to looking straight up at the underside of the elevated walkway and towering buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with seating areas and neon storefronts

events.description: camera tilts back down to walking position and continues forward

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the pedestrian street past benches and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in patterned jacket walking toward the camera
person sitting on bench looking at a device

entered.detail: tall modern street light with horizontal illuminated bar

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to street level and continues walking along the pedestrian path. The golden holographic fish is now visible in the distance on the left, while pedestrians walk past and others sit on benches. The neon-lit towers remain visible ahead as the walk continues through the cyberpunk plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk plaza that shifts from a street-level approach to a towering vertical perspective before returning to the urban flow. It begins by walking along a concrete walkway toward a massive golden holographic koi fish suspended between skyscrapers, with the Petrochem tower dominating the background. As the camera tilts upward, the view leaves the pedestrians behind to follow the golden fish swimming through the skyscraper canyon, briefly passing a smaller blue holographic fish before looking straight up at the underside of an elevated walkway. The scene then shifts back down to street level, continuing along the pedestrian path where people stroll and sit on benches. Finally, the camera moves forward through the plaza with the golden holographic fish receding into the distance on the left while the neon-lit towers remain visible ahead.
